attributes.action: If benefits received are over the tax threshold tax should be paid
attributes.additional_details: Working people like myself, who often find themselves on the edge of financial stability, have always abided by a system where earned income above a certain threshold is taxed appropriately. This is a fundamental aspect of our tax system that ensures fairness and equity among all citizens. However, a glaring discrepancy exists in the way our tax laws are structured, allowing benefit recipients to receive amounts exceeding the tax threshold without contributing back to the system.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
'Tax all welfare and benefits at identical rates as earned income'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/753426
